name: Gardevoir

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

forms.name: Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: It uses its elegant appearance to lure people in, giving them a false sense of security before biting their neck and draining them of their vitality. Despite being known for its vanity, many folktales claim that this Pokémon has no reflection.

forms.name: Mega-Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: The immense energy brought upon by Mega Evolution grants it immense power, but at a cost of triggering its appetite. If its trainer isn't careful, Gardevoir may try to sneak a bite to drain some of their vitality.

forms.name: sylvevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Sylveon, possessing even greater Fairy power!

forms.name: umbrevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Umbreon, possessing even greater Dark power!

forms.name: espevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Espeon, possessing even greater Psychic power!

forms.name: flarevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Flareon, possessing even greater Fire power!

forms.name: vaporevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Vaporeon, possessing even greater Water power!

forms.name: glacevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Glaceon, possessing even greater Ice power!

forms.name: leafevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Leafeon, possessing even greater Grass power!

forms.name: joltevoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Jolteon, possessing even greater Electric power!

forms.name: reshievoir
forms.pokedexDescription: A fusion of Gardevoir and Reshiram, the angel with pure white wings!

forms.name: queen
forms.pokedexDescription: The queen form of Gardevoir, possessing devastating destructive power.

forms.name: Mega-Z
forms.pokedexDescription: Upon Mega Evolving, Gardevoir becomes much more temperamental. Although it continues to protect its trainer, any threat is met with extreme aggression.

pokedexDescription: Gardevoir has taken on the grace of a harpy, its wings catching even the softest breeze. It watches over traveling companions, singing a gentle note when danger draws near.

evolutions.summary: Usar harpy_lyre · Sosteniendo: dusk_stone · De noche · Amistad 220+
